channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Seattle's Court-Appointed U.S. Attorney Files Lawsuit Against Trump Over Illegal Firing
item.description: A court-appointed U.S. attorney for the Seattle region, Roger Rogoff, has filed a lawsuit against the Trump administration after being abruptly fired less than an hour after being named the top federa...

item.title: AI Disproves the Jacobian Conjecture, a Long-Standing Math Problem
item.description: A recent article from Mashable highlights how Levent Alpöge, using Anthropic's Fable 5 AI model, disproved the Jacobian conjecture—a mathematical problem that had remained unsolved for nearly 90 years...

item.title: Bangladesh's Controversial Spokesperson Appointments Spark Diplomatic Concerns
item.description: The Bangladesh government's decision to appoint two journalists critical of India as spokespersons in its embassies in New Delhi and Kolkata has sparked diplomatic concerns. Saidur Rahman, appointed a...

item.title: South Africa faces gas supply crisis in 2028 and needs urgent planning
item.description: The article discusses the potential crisis South Africa may face due to a sharp decline in gas supplies by 2028, emphasizing the need for immediate action to avoid economic and energy shortages. It hi...

item.title: Petrol Pump Owners Demand Monthly Pricing and Commission Hike Amid Striking Nationwide
item.description: The All Pakistan Petrol Pumps Owners Association (APPPOA) has declared a nationwide strike starting Wednesday night following failed negotiations with the government over daily fuel pricing. Petrol pu...

item.title: Public health alert issued for measles exposure in Nanaimo area
item.description: A measles exposure alert has been issued in the Nanaimo area of Vancouver Island following the confirmation of a case. Health authorities are urging individuals who may have been exposed to the virus ...

item.title: R1 Billion Blended Finance Programme Aims to Address Housing Gap in South Africa
item.description: A R1 billion blended finance programme, launched by Rand Merchant Bank (RMB) and INDLU, seeks to bridge South Africa's housing gap of 2.3 million units by providing sustainable credit to micro-develop...

item.title: Tanzania Promotes Traditional Cuisine for Global Recognition
item.description: Tanzania has initiated a campaign to gain international recognition for its traditional cuisine, aiming to elevate its culinary heritage on the global stage. This effort underscores the country's ambi...

item.title: Agot Isidro's 60th Birthday Celebrated with Concert and Special Guests
item.description: Agot Isidro, the beloved Filipino actor and television personality, recently celebrated his 60th birthday in a grand concert event that brought together fans, celebrities, and industry peers. The cele...

item.title: Technical issues preventing access to Mornington Peninsula weather updates
item.description: News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites. If users are blocked and not bots, they should temporarily disable AdBlockers or script blockers, ensure Jav...

item.title: Abuja realtor faces arrest over land fraud allegations
item.description: A federal court in Abuja ordered the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) to arrest realtor Rebecca Godwin-Isaac for skipping a hearing in her land fraud trial. The judge issued the order a...

item.title: EFCC Arrests Abuja Realtor Over ₦500 Million Land Fraud Allegations
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) has arrested Rebecca Omokamo Godwin-Isaac, an Abuja-based realtor, after a Federal High Court ordered her custody for her trial over alleged land fr...

item.title: Saudi Oil Tankers Change Route as Houthi Threats Deepen Regional Conflict and Disrupt Key Shipping Lanes
item.description: Two oil tankers carrying Saudi crude to China and India reversed course in the Red Sea after Yemen's Iran-aligned Houthi movement threatened to attack vessels involved in transporting Saudi oil. The m...

item.title: US introduces bill to criminalize foreign repression targeting activists
item.description: A bipartisan group of US senators has introduced the Stop Transnational Repression Act of 2026, aiming to criminalize foreign governments' efforts to intimidate political opponents and activists in th...

item.title: Lionel Messi Reflects on Heartbreaking World Cup Final Defeat to Spain
item.description: Lionel Messi has shared his emotional reaction to Argentina's 1-0 extra-time loss to Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final, marking the end of a historic campaign. The 39-year-old legend posted a hea...

item.title: Women’s World Cup 2027: Brazil Hosts as Spain and USA Prepare for Clash
item.description: The article discusses the upcoming Women’s World Cup in Brazil, set for next summer, and highlights key teams and preparations. Spain, currently the top-ranked women’s team, won the 2023 tournament, w...

item.title: Ondo Assembly to Address Speaker and Deputy Over Alleged N44Million Fund Mismanagement
item.description: The Ondo State House of Assembly is set to decide the fate of Speaker Olamide Oladiji and Deputy Speaker Ololade Gbegudu after they failed to resign over allegations of misusing ₦44 million from the O...

item.title: Senate Expresses Concern Over Misuse of Flood Rehabilitation Funds in KP
item.description: A Senate panel has raised serious concerns about the misallocation of flood rehabilitation funds in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP), accusing authorities of diverting resources to less-affected areas for poli...

item.title: British man stranded in Dubai appeals for help after illness, debt and visa issues leave him unable to return to the UK
item.description: Simon Ferguson, a 64-year-old British aviation consultant originally from Mancot in North Wales, says he is trapped in Dubai after a combination of serious health problems, financial difficulties and ...

item.title: Deaf actor Kaylee Hottle, known for Godzilla vs. Kong, dies in Maryland car crash
item.description: Kaylee Hottle, a Deaf actress who played Jia in the films 'Godzilla vs. Kong' and its sequel, has died at the age of 18 following a severe car accident in Maryland. Her father, Joshua Hottle, confirme...
